review_text: Very close to everything,  not to noisy.  Clean facilities.

Als je aankomt en per ongeluk je voertuig ergens neerzet wat de receptioniste niet bevalt, kun je rekenen op een enorme tirade. Uitgelegd dat iedereen er gewoon door kan en we dus niets in de weg staan blijft ze doormekkeren. Toen zeiden wij, weet u wat, de mazzel wij zijn weer weg. Toen naar Colour city caravan park gereden alwaar we een uiterst vriendelijke ontvangst kregen
Great for overnight stay

I had a powered site, staff were lovely, amenaties were clean, the door to mens & ladies didnt lock, i used the washing machine but it didnt spin dry i had to squeeze the water out, i was surprised it was a big 4, there was absolutely nothing for kids, no pool, no park not even a swing, it is a sml park maybe 5mins to shopping center by car, just outside the caravan park there is a jayco caravan repair center which could b handy if needed
Orange was busy but managed to get a cabin here. Quiet and clean and well located near the Ophir hotel. Made more exciting around 8.12pm by the earthquake 😳😂

The worst cabin we have ever used. Cooktop element coated with burnt food, cooktop exhaust fan not working , Fan in shower filthy, light above dining table not working, fly wire door lock not working ,goose neck over sink loose
October 25

If you’re looking for a quiet and relaxing place to park up your rig for a night or more in Orange, do not go past this place!!

The sites are well presented and incredibly easy to connect up to.

The amenities are clean and are up to date.

However,

The best part of the whole experience is the welcoming atmosphere in which you will be received and in our case, it was the lovely Monique that made our day!

Her ability to provide superior customer service is something that is very much appreciated when touring Australia and are in new surroundings on a regular basis. After so long on the road, she made us feel as though we belonged there and already had been staying there for a while.

If you are lucky enough to visit soon and are greeted by this wonderfully energetic lady, do everything you can to soak up her enthusiasm and willingness to help you with any questions or concerns during your stay, you will instantly feel at ease!
This place was friendly & clean, it's a go guys, hope u have a gas adventure, time out even!!!!🤙🌺

We stayed here for 3 weeks getting to know Orange and buying our new house. Everyone was kind, helpful and friendly. Our three whippets were welcomed. The laundry was well kept and there was never an issue getting a time to use it.
The area was nicely maintained and surprisingly quiet for such a central location. We walked to town a fair bit and to the coffee shops.
A very nice caravan park all round.

Dated facilities.
Site was not level for the caravan. Acorns dropping on roof (not much they can do about this).
Bathrooms were okay.
Kitchen tap although useable is not fixed so leans and moves in ways it shouldn't.
Laundry not great, machines look very dated, one detergent dispenser is even broken (although still functional). No signs reiterating their policy to not wash pet bedding. One machine was covered in pet hair. All the seals were full of mould/grime/black gunk and it transfers to your clothes.

I stayed recently in a standard cabin for one night which was not to my standard .This filthy accommodation costing  $195 .The bathroom smelt like sewage , the floor near the toilet sunk down , some of the towels were dirty and  bedding. The kitchen table was not clean. Tv did not work and heater did not work . Front door mat was filthy and ripped a Hazzard. The verticals did not provide privacy and were filthy
The staff at front counter was very welcoming. The park was very clean, quiet , close to shops. The cabin was very clean, comfortable. Couldn't fault it. I would definitely stay there again.
Central to city, ammenities clean and water hot . Can be a mission to put tie down pegs in.
Good sites, Clean facilities and quiet.

OUTSTANDING!!!
the service from the reception staff was top tier going above and beyond with their service and advice on the area.
we spoke to Monique when checking in and she was such an inviting and warm person after a long day of travel. we will be returning

Be careful with booking two emails giving one price  on day of booking and another email receive yesterday  yet when I ring to confirm check in told price was wrong and it had increased.    Went from a long stay rate of $18 per night for 7 days a night only staying on site 3 nights .  To being told $47.50 per night for 7 nights regardless of only staying  3 .  Yes I know $18 is cheap I didn’t pick this rate was told it and emailed it in booking.  Would have been shock when got there tomorrow.  It was the rude way Monic handled

Best place for camping
If its your first time experience 🏕️
Try this location
Electricity on site
Local shops near by
Everything you can get from there
THIS IS THE PLACE TO STAY!!|Lovely park, amenities cleaned multiple times a day, full length doors for added privacy, under cover bbq areas and amazing staff!!

THIS IS THE PLACE TO STAY!!
My family and I recently stayed at this caravan park, mixed between cabins, powered sites and unpowered sites.
If I could give more than 5 stars I would, the staff alone make this place an absolute pleasure to stay at. Then on top of that the park is private and hidden off the road so minimal road noise, the amenities are stunning! Cleaned multiple times a day with full length doors which gives you much more privacy. The laundry is a great size ($5.00 per load washer or dryer and mostly $1 coins but they also accept $2’s), plenty of grassed areas for kids and dogs to play, the camp kitchen has everything and there are covered BBQ areas all throughout the park.
We gave minimal notice with adding extra days and it was never an issue for the staff at all.
We are planning a return trip with all our families in winter.
Also plenty to see and do close by. Take a walk, ride or short drive into town.
If you’re looking for a clean, safe, kid and dog friendly park this is it!!
I stayed a few nights here alone (female in a small van) and felt very safe.

A satisfactory experience overall with some hickups. Lots of room for vans, motorhomes and tents. Powered and unpowered sites. Reasonable rates. Facilities clean and paper supplied for hand towels and toilet (mens). Some problems with taps and water flow. Friendly staff.
Excellent service, neat and clean amenities, best location.

Lovely caravan park, well maintained, friendly staff.  There are security bom gates so given a dongle  when booked in with codes for the shower/toilet blocks. There’s a camp kitchen well equipped and very clean, also the laundry. The showers/ toilet block are very clean, I also noticed that the cleaning of the amenities are done between 5-6 am daily a bonus seeing other places do their cleaning of amenities blocks at times when everyone wants to go to use the toilet/shower. Good price. Highly recommended
The staff were great. However, we found the park to be in need of refurbishment. The amenities reflected that.

Could be nice park if run properly. Place full of vans and second mens toilet block not open. Block that is open has no paper toweling to dry hands and cubicles with no toilet paper! Skip bins around park overflowing with rubbish. Very poor.
What a beautiful, clean tidy Park. The staff were amazing. The showers and toilets were dry clean. Would recommend this Caravan Park.

Big4 member discount. Clean quite new cabin. No dust no mould. Big fridge freezer. Comfortable beds. Surprisingly quiet in cabin 6 even though near Mitchell Highway. Car spot next to it. Note small hot water tank for in cabin shower. You may need to use amenities block.
Quite spot not so good for big rigs.
We had a powerd site and we found the park very clean and good value for money

A beautiful, grassy park that you wouldnt know was located on the main road. The gravel sites were full so we stayed on a grass site which I think was better as it was spread out from other travellers. A handy location. Staff member at check in was so friendly.|Stayed with a small dog too.
Receptionist was very friendly. Park was tidy.

Overall an average caravan park to stay in, was quite disappointed upon arrival as the photos on their website are a complete lie of what the park looks like, however the reception staff were friendly and the amenities were alright.
Tight spacing for caravans and straight onto either a concrete slab or grass.
Affordable sites for what it is.

I stayed in the camping zone at the park. Super clean facilities all around. I will definitely recommend for an overnight or a long term stay. Mostly caravans, but suitable for swags and roof top tents no firepits. But Available kitchens for cooking and basic kettle / microwave for shared use. Thanks.
Excellent service and very easy to book and arrive.  Very peaceful and quiet.  Thanks folks
Great cabin stay , friendly staff.
Very nice caravan park and very helpful staff.

A variety of older and new cabins and a good camp and caravan site convenient for Orange town centre only 2km away. The area is a bit industrial rather than rural but the caravan park is far enough back from the main road to be nice and quiet. Our cabin was nice and clean with good amenities.
Beaut spot.
Very nice clean campsite. Tent pegs are easy to put in, everything is lovely.
We have our own caravan so we got a powered site all we needed was there
The 13 days here have been good, clean, quiet, well recommended.

We were in Orange for Christmas  family get together and needed somewhere to stay so we booked a 2 bedroom cabin here. The cabin was basic but very clean and extremely well maintained with 2 bedrooms, very comfy bed, air con, great shower & toilet. The cabin is on smallish size but was comfortable for 3 people. Great staff & location, close to places to eat & shops. I would definitely recommend this C/P as somewhere to stay when in Orange.

Its a well maintained park with great clean bathroom facilities.
For tented camping, ask for sites N,K&I - 21 to  16 have no trees for shade.

Just booked a stay here for March 2025.  Like others when I tried to ring there was no answer so I sent them a message via their website with my booking request for a powered site.  I immediately received an automated reply acknowledging my request and within 20 minutes I received an email from Monique confirming my booking.  Very impressed with this process and would highly recommend this as the way to go.  Looking forward to our visit and stay.  Thank you Monique. 👍
Stayed 1 night. The receptionist was great, but for $165 cabin was not worth it. Cabin needed a good clean and verandah and furniture needs replacing.
Clean, handy for town and super helpful, thank you.

Stayed in a cabin for one night on our way home to Melbourne, the bed was comfortable, however there were a number of issues that needed attention. In short overpriced for what we received. Paid $160.00 for a dripping shower head along with a couple of lights not working, to list a couple of things among others.

We stayed here recently overnight on our travels through out NSW.  It was the middle of winter and minus something overnight.  We booked a cabin and it was very warm and inviting.    It was nicely furnished and adequately equipped.  It was cozy, warm with plenty of blankets comfy beds and adequate heating.  The location is great, quiet ,not far from the centre of town and an easy walking distance to the local takeaways.  ||The staff were wonderful, great communicators, friendly and professional.   Special  and grateful thanks to Renae as we had left some tems behind the cabin and she went out of her way to post them back to us.   ||Keep up the good work Conabolas and  I would happily stay with you again.
Great caravan park nice and clean ,pet are allowed. And if you need a service done or anything on your caravan, it's right next door, so it's very handy .

This caravan park is a little gem, we have stayed here many times and just love it. The amenities are really clean and lovely hot showers, the park itself is clean& tidy, the laundry has everything you need. The staff are great and  really friendly. We have stayed  in all the powered sites and they are all good. |Would definitely recommend this park.

My husband and I stayed 2 nights in a cabin and whilst our initial call went unanswered, Renee returned our call within 10mins.. Cabin was clean (including bathroom). The queen bed was comfortable and the supplied linen and pillows were clean.
The grounds were well maintained and the park was quiet and peaceful.

Don’t bother! After trying to call someone for three days and leaving messages that weren’t returned we finally got a hold of someone. A lovely and helpful lady booked us a two bedroom cabin for the night BUT after we arrived and went to cook dinner that night we discovered a cutlery and a utensil draw caked in mould. Yikes! No one in the office after hours so we boiled the kettle and cleaned them ourselves. The cabin was dated which is okay but the filthy bed covers and stained sheets etc was a bit much! The cockroach that emerged from the toaster was the icing on the cake 😱. BUT check out the “rules” and note that in freezing Orange you have a 20 litre hot water system that takes an hour to reheat if you can’t make that work (two bedroom cabin with 3 of us) you need to go to the amenities block, let alone the charges if you don’t leave it spotless. Shame they don’t check the state of it before they book someone into it. The other joy was the double bed in the second room that was a thin double mattress over a king size single new mattress covered in plastic, meaning if you are near the edge of the double you have no support and it all falls down. Really! There is more but I won’t burden you with the rest of it except to point out that it cost us $180 for one night and the next day on route to our next stop we tried to call to discuss it and found we were back to the original problem that is, no body answers the phone. 🙄

This is  great caravan park just out of the centre of town, but still has many facilities nearby. The sites are clean and mostly with slabs, so are easy to park a van on. It has lovely well cared for grounds.  The ablution block we used is not new, but is clean and convenient. Overall a good park and can easily recommend this to our friends and everyone else.|Also, the park is secure with boomgates and keypads to get in or out.
We booked a cabin here as it ticked all my boxes. Although we didn't end up getting there all our interactions with staff were very helpful and left me feeling happy.

We needed a cabin urgently following a family serious car crash, right when orange was booked out for the food festival. These people found us a cabin and made available a site for a van, then went out of their way to help us with changing shifts of family members and indefinite stay times, always friendly and making helpful suggestions. They really made our tough times easier and i highly recommend them.

Very good cabins for price. Stayed here for 1 night on a Mountain Bike (MTB) trip from Sydney. Cabins were clean, modern and well appointed.
Highly recommend place to stay.

Lovely big, grassy caravan spot with slab. Other spots not grassy. Very clean ammenities. Helpful staff. It is a long way out of town but there is nothing closer. Quiet. Would recommend. Walked 1km down road to Ophir Pub - great, cheap food.

A lovely well maintained caravan park, close to town. Had a small problem locating the entrance as the Jayco caravan sales yard is next to it and there are two entrances, so a bit confusing. Lady in reception was very friendly and efficient. Facilities are good and we got a stay seven pay six night deal. Can recommend this park to everyone.

Lovely quiet caravan/camping spot with spotless amenities and lush green grass. Well equipped camp kitchen with oodles of hot water for washing the dishes. Right in the middle of Orange set back from the road behind Jayco. I just wish there was a light over the ladies door as its impossoble for us oldies to see to press in the correct passcode. One couple in our party of 20 used a cabin which was faultless. Highly recommend if you need accommodation in Orange.
Brilliant caravan park / camp ground, set on lovely grounds. 5 mins into town. Very quiet, well maintained. Friendly staff. Great showers
Fabulous park. Clean amenities. Friendly staff. Great sites
Very tidy Caravan Park, just missing a swimming pool. We enjoyed our stay.

Walking around the park to orient himself, my husband saw the camp kitchen was very messy & dirty. Both bins were overflowing. He picked up some rubbish & went to empty the smaller bin into the larger one - the smaller bin was crawling with maggots!!!
He reported it to the woman in the office. She said she would “get onto the cleaners”!! 24 hours later, nothing had changed! Behind the laundry machines was a huge build up of grime & dust!!
Would never think of staying there again - & have travelled extensively in our caravan & motorhomes in Australia & Europe.

Got in at 4.30 .office closed at 5. Notice on door any help ring police . Given wrong directions to cabin. A/C in cabin 2 had big problems, noisy all night. Password for WiFi would not work on 3 devices .Will not stay again.

I camped (tent) on a beautiful grassed area.
The only criticism I have is that the men's bathroom needs renovation.
Stayed in a two room cabin.Quite adequate.
Nice and clean with good facilities. Very friendly and helpful staff. Convenient location with pub, fast food and bottle shop in walking distsnce.

Grounds well maintained and decent size site for our van
Basic camp kitchen
Quiet camp grounds
Shower facilities are pretty good though don’t forgot the codes needed as no key
Location okay as we like a walk , little outside main street
forget trying to get an Uber

Wonderful friendly, very clean,safe place to stay. Everything  you need. It's quite  of the road. The owners of the caravan park are truly  lovely and very helpful. There are restaurants, BWS, etc...walking distance. Yes I have really enjoyed staying there.
Had a powered site, neat tidy park, amenities are acceptable

Good caravan park 45 mins to Bathurst for car racing. Hot showers 9-10 am,only criticism was one day at 7.30 couldn't get it balanced going boiling hot/freezing cold I think due to others using gas hot water same time and burnt my tummy a bit. Well maintained. Re-bitumising road during our stay (just unlucky)
Great caravan park with beautiful area and facilities. Excellent.
Very basic van park. Pleasant grounds but tired facilities and entrance road to the park
camped in the unpowered site. excellent grass, facilities clean, good location. would recommend.

This is a lovely caravan park. Renee, the receptionist, is very helpful and, most importantly, the bathrooms are spotless. It is a nice small, grassy CP with great drive through sites on large slabs.
I'll be back!
Best place of 10 Star
